/obsidian.title: Obsidian Manchester Apartments | UK Property Investment
/obsidian.description: Discover Obsidian Manchester apartments from £249,000, with premium amenities, up to 6% gross yield and dedicated support for UAE investors.
/obsidian.content: Obsidian is a landmark 26-storey development of premium studios and one, two and three-bedroom apartments near Manchester and Salford city centre.
bullets: Up to 6% indicative gross rental yield
Dedicated property investment support for UAE buyers
